overview.account_overview_sub_imports: Imports detail · Balance projection blends snapshots + modeled flows (Planning)
overview.account_overview_chart_desc: Balance projection (second tab when imports exist): each step compounds snapshots by (1+drift)^step and adds each account's share — by default snapshot proportions — of cumulative modeled household surplus from Planning (cashflows, calendar periods, benefits). CSV import charts are unaffected.
overview.field_monthly_drift: Monthly drift on snapshots (decimal, e.g. 0.002 for +0.2% per step)
overview.field_monthly_drift_hint: Compounded on baseline snapshots; modeled surplus from Planning adds on top.
overview.cashflow_chart_desc: Spread adjusts bars relative to your current monthly income and expense totals. 0 uses the same value each month.
overview.field_cashflow_spread: Spread across months (±%, e.g. 5 ≈ ±5% from center)
overview.no_adults_accounts: No adults configured. Go to Data & Settings to add entities.

planning.calendar_tooltip: Period scheduling: each entity can have periods with FTE %. The projection engine scales salary and replaces benefits accordingly.
planning.income_projection_sub: 6 months forward — driven by calendar periods
planning.income_projection_tooltip: 6-month projection from periods, FTE%, and cashflows. Unemployment and parental rules follow your Swedish benefit configuration.

data.people_companies_tooltip: Recurring income is stored gross. Illustrative net projections use household country/city defaults. Internal-only lines omit flow charts and totals when marked.
data.cashflows_sub: Budget lines + patterns from bank imports

expenses.renovation_by_project_sub: Imported renovation CSV totals by project
expenses.monthly_trend_desc: 0 repeats your current total monthly expenses each month. Increase spread to fan bars slightly for illustration.
expenses.renovation_import_sub: Bundled renovation CSV imports — rooms and contractors appear as separate cards.

retirement.pension_dialog_desc: Illustrative series from a starting monthly level and a constant annual growth rate. Does not replace official forecasts.
retirement.pension_growth_field: Annual growth rate for this chart (%, e.g. 6 for 6%)
retirement.pension_empty_hint: Add adults in Data & Settings to see projections
retirement.fire_dialog_desc: Leave empty to use the sum of bank, savings, investment, and pension balances ({{amount}}).
retirement.net_worth_dialog_desc: Simple compounding on totals from Data. Asset growth uses (1 + rate)^year; debt uses factor^year (1 = flat, 0.96 ≈ −4%/year).
retirement.leave_intro: Pension gap estimate for parental or unpaid leave.
retirement.leave_dialog_desc: Rough monthly equivalent multiplied by leave months from your period records.
retirement.leave_gap_field: Estimated pension gap per leave month (SEK)
